en.title: Weekly Update — April 5, 2026
en.description: This week's highlights: 84 new features,50 bug fixes,54 other improvements.
en.body:
## What's New This Week

Here's a summary of 188 changes from the past 7 days.

### New Features

- add SDK docs translations for 6 languages
- @agena/sdk TypeScript package + /sdk landing page + docs SDK section
- i18n: footer fully translated in 7 languages, add roadmap + API docs links
- webhook tester, API docs, public roadmap, auto changelog in deploy
- add 10 blog posts in 5 languages: ES, DE, ZH, IT, JA (2 per language)
- i18n: add 7-language translations for all public pages + fix contact mobile layout
- add search to docs sidebar with instant results dropdown
- add reading progress bar, TOC sidebar, and share buttons to blog posts
- add fade-up page transition animation between routes
- add per-page OG images for docs, blog, contact, changelog, use-cases, status
- add /status to sitemap, remove /pricing
- 9 new frontend features - testimonials, status page, blog search, cookie consent, back-to-top, FAQ, newsletter footer, theme animation, improved 404
- mobile responsive improvements + mobile menu with full navigation
- 5 new flow templates, fix duplicate install bug
- error boundaries, deep health check, CORS hardening, request tracing, auth rate limit
- device code login, bridge improvements, agent config fixes
- enhanced onboarding (6 steps), command center dashboard, sprint UX fixes
- RSS feed, pricing FAQ schema, security.txt
- SEO sitelinks — SearchAction, SiteNavigationElement, breadcrumbs
- Product Hunt navbar link + professional docs page
- full ChatOps — Slack Events API + Teams Bot Framework + UI fields
- DB-only bot config, refinement cache, Telegram UI
- Telegram ChatOps bot support
- Teams ChatOps — command tasks from Teams channel
- auto-select active sprint + SEO improvements
- dual Google Analytics + Microsoft Clarity tracking
- admin-first sidebar — platform admins see admin nav on top
- agena CLI tool — admin:user:create, admin:user:list, admin:user:promote
- interactive admin creation CLI with password confirmation
- create_admin.py CLI script + README docs
- platform admin panel — orgs, users, contact, newsletter management
- contact page with form, newsletter opt-in, and navbar link
- Clarity analytics, Web Vitals, dynamic OG images, newsletter, redirects
- Azure Sprint-to-Merge full pipeline flow template
- analyzer/planner/reviewer agent presets, Azure reviewer picker
- Azure DevOps node — project/repo dropdowns + preset template
- Azure DevOps node for flows + remove lead_developer role lock
- n8n-style flow node configuration overhaul
- improved sidebar menu — colored group headers, separators, hover effects
- office agent wizard step 4 (prompt/settings), fix promptSlugs prop, compact sidebar
- agent prompt selector — choose from Prompt Studio or write custom
- add local dev frontend service on port 3010
- monorepo package split — 6 pip-installable packages
- move notifications/profile/usage to top bar, clean up sidebar
- group sidebar navigation into collapsible sections
- prompt studio shows default prompts in editor for direct editing
- sync all locale files — add missing translations for ES, ZH, IT, DE, JA
- add guided tour for dashboard onboarding
- load LLM prompts from database instead of static constants
- optimize node dragging with deferred state update
- add prompt_overrides table and simplify editor UI
- add PR detail tables to team health symptoms + green border for synced repos
- add author-level detail queries for team health symptoms
- add DORA team health symptoms + Azure project discovery
- comprehensive SEO implementation
- Add video
- batch developer step for large file sets (80K char batches)
- cost optimization + running task glow + local/remote repo toggle
- add gpt-5.1-codex-mini to rerun model selector
- remote PR creation via Azure Pushes API and GitHub Contents API
- remote agents.md fetch + combined planner context + top action bar
- remote repo file reading + rerun popup with model/repo selection
- AI Assign + Flow Assign popups now include repo selection
- Run Config popup on task detail — repo + agent selection before run
- sprint remote repo selector, plan upgrades, error display fixes
- RemoteRepoSelector component — project → repo → branch flow
- remote repo picker in Boss Mode assign modal
- remote repo support — read repo via GitHub/Azure API, no clone needed
- flows canvas touch support for mobile drag & connect
- flows page responsive + office panel toggle
- Add readme screenshots for documentation
- Jira status colors, expandable flow runs, usage menu fix
- dashboard mobile responsive + deploy docs
- mobile responsive landing, sprint-performance fixes, zero-downtime deploy
- Add per-item result modal links and persist refinement snapshots locally
- Add refinement writeback for Azure/Jira with comment signature and links
- Add refinement workflow UI/API and harden model parameter handling
- Harden AI planning and add task image vision inputs
- Do not auto-queue imported/new tasks; require manual start
- add Tiqr favicon for app routes
- complete dashboard + landing multilingual rollout
- localize dashboard sidebar and notification labels for es/zh/it/de/ja
- add 7-language selector and expand localized dashboard/landing/auth copy
- improve landing auth UI and light theme polish
### Bug Fixes

- add missing lang destructure in docs page causing client-side 500
- add testimonials i18n, remove pricing section, update SDK package name
- checkbox label visible with word-break instead of overflow hidden
- checkbox label text wraps with overflow-wrap anywhere
- checkbox text overflow on mobile + add 36 blog posts in 6 languages
- contact checkbox label wraps properly on mobile
- navbar logo more visible on mobile dark mode
- changelog reads from static JSON instead of runtime git
- fix cookie consent styling for light mode
- contact form responsive - stack inputs and reduce padding on mobile
- remove duplicate X-Frame-Options header from Next.js config
- rerun modal uses correct repo mappings format, filter active agents only
- correct Product Hunt logo SVG in navbar
- resolve local dev issues — icon.svg 500, hydration mismatch, X-Frame-Options
- redirect platform admin to /dashboard/admin on login
- remove Pricing from navbar
- hide org-level nav for platform admins — admin-only sidebar
- clean navbar grouping, skip onboarding for platform admins
- add mobile floating + button for flow node picker
- DORA sync no longer creates repo mappings, add delete confirmation
- nav group toggle respects manual collapse even when active
- compact office header to give more height to pixel map
- revert pixel office CSS, increase container height to 100vh-104px
- align pixel office map to top of container
- increase office pixel map height to prevent bottom toolbar overlap
- center pixel office canvas in iframe container
- office page height calc for top bar, prevent content cutoff
- replace 'from db import models' with agena_models in main.py and worker
- complete import rewrite for all package files
- remove overview from sidebar, remove duplicate lang toggle from topbar
- prompt studio dark mode - replace hardcoded colors with CSS variables
- add project root to sys.path in alembic env.py
- show all files in code preview/diff + remote mode diff support
- remote repo priority over stale local path + agent config in run popup
- validate local_repo_path exists before using as repo_root
- remote repo mode skips disk-based file reading checks
- flows top bar reorganized + node positioning improved
- flows canvas visible on mobile with min-height and scroll
- remove CSS 2x zoom, add programmatic zoom+ on pixel office load
- flows scroll, office panel default closed, mobile pixel 2x zoom
- restore full header on dashboard, improve mobile sidebar toggle
- dashboard navbar cleanup + overview page responsive
- fix prod deploy routing websocket and backup automation
- backfill non-en locale json values from tr for missing/en entries
- apply non-en values for mappings and templates locales
- populate non-tr/en locale dictionaries with base keys
- force locale overlays for mappings/templates/sprints/integrations
- translate integrations tab content for es/zh/it/de/ja
- add non-EN integration labels for dashboard integrations
- use full-coverage TR fallback for es/zh/it/de/ja dashboard pages
### Documentation

- add SDK and i18n rules to CLAUDE.md
- update TR docs with improved translations
- i18n: docs content in 7 languages + navbar links translated
- i18n: docs page sidebar and navigation translated in 7 languages (38 keys)
- fix header overlap + expand content detail
- seo: 3 Turkish blog posts + README backlinks for keyword targeting
- update CLAUDE.md for monorepo package structure
- comprehensive README rewrite for monorepo package structure
- add Boss Mode hero image to README header
- add screenshots section to README with all dashboard views
- update vulnerability contact email
- add sponsor callouts and navbar donate button
- add open-source governance and funding setup
### Refactoring

- remove old source directories after package migration
- move extra_description append logic from frontend to backend assign endpoint
- read directly from locale json dictionaries
- move base dictionaries into locale json files
### Performance

- Redis cache for Azure/Jira sprint endpoints + parallel Azure requests
- shrink large files to 20K char excerpts before developer batching
- cap remote file reading at 80K to prevent mini model refusal
- lightweight file tree for agents.md repos + always show real paths
- skip full repo context scan when agents.md exists
### Other Changes

- SEO: JSON-LD enrichment, hreflang, sitemap 57 posts, robots, internal links
- i18n: use-cases page fully translated in 7 languages (47 keys)
- blog posts filtered by active language
- rewrite contact page: compact layout, flex inputs, no overflow
- update changelog data with latest commits
- changelog now shows real git commits with type filters and timeline
- seo: security headers, canonical URLs, OG images, Product schema
- repo mapping agent.md path changed
- migrations
- remove org_1 agents data and ignore agents_md
- Fix: bypass CrewAI entirely for codex models, use direct LLM
- Fix: disable CrewAI reasoning for codex models + navbar auth reactivity
- Rename project from Tiqr to AGENA (Autonomous Generative Agent Network Architecture)
- Update integration SVG logos and patron.png asset
- refinement: include Azure acceptance criteria and repro steps in item context
- azure refinement: generate fallback work item web_url when links are missing
- refinement: replace confirm with modal and make item titles open source links
- Move refinement actions to item rows and enforce non-question comments
- Persist refinement history in DB and flag previously commented items
- Stabilize AI planning and honor selected agent settings
- Prototype real CrewAI agent runtime
- Key added translations
- Improve sprint description rendering and pass image-reading instruction to AI
- Added IT DE language
- Added IT DE language
- Added IT DE language
- Added IT language
- Added ja and zh language
- Landing page updates
- Update landing page
